project_type: TypeScript monorepo (Turborepo + pnpm) - 13-app ecosystem with shared packages
build_system: Turborepo + pnpm workspaces. Each package/app has 'typecheck', 'test', 'build', 'lint' scripts. Root turbo.json orchestrates.
test_framework: Vitest with vi for mocking. Tests live in __tests__/ directories or co-located *.test.ts files. Uses describe/it/expect/beforeEach pattern.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'pnpm turbo typecheck' from workspace root. 2. Run 'pnpm turbo test' from workspace root. 3. Run 'pnpm turbo lint' from workspace root. All must pass.
setup_instructions: pnpm install from workspace root. Node >=22 required. pnpm@10.28.1.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Can install packages freely.
contribution_requirements: Small reviewable diffs (<=500 LOC per PR). Performance budgets are gates. All gates must pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint, audit. Cross-app data flow needs an event, not a function call.
key_patterns: 1. Shared packages in packages/ export via barrel index.ts. 2. Apps at apps/<name>/backend/ with services/ pattern. 3. Dependency injection via constructor params. 4. Services are class-based with explicit public methods. 5. Notifications package has: UniversalNotificationCenter (basic), FanoutService, PreferenceService, PushService (FCM+APNs), EmailDigestService, SchedulerService, InAppService. 6. Realtime package has: WebSocketServer, PresenceManager, ChannelManager, DeliveryManager. 7. sync-engine package has full CRDT support (CRDTDocument, SyncProtocol, ConflictResolver, OfflineQueue). 8. QuantDocs has YjsServer (basic in-memory) + PresenceService (cursor tracking) + CommentService. 9. Zod for validation. pino for logging. ws for WebSocket.
directory_structure: Root: turbo.json, package.json, vitest.config.ts. packages/ has 40+ shared libs (notifications, realtime, sync-engine, etc). apps/ has 13 apps (quantchat, quantmail, quantdocs, etc). services/ has 18 microservices (ws-gateway, cdc-relay, etc).
